SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-26-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:15am
Judge Pro Tem John P. Lynch, clerk-beth wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for small claims appeal. Claudia Montejo, respondent, appears in Pro Per, Donald E. Bloom, Esq. appears for appellant, Jim Khorge. Louis Herrera appears with Ms. Montejo to interpret Spanish to English and English to Spanish. Judge Lynch swears in the witnesses and Ms. Montejo testifies in the narrative. Mr. Bloom cross-examines Ms. Montejo.
